## Professional Electives

| QECE005 | Internet of Things (IoT) Fundamentals | 4 | None |

## Others:
1. Introduction to Catholic Faith: Non-credit, required for all non-Catholic and graduates of non-Catholic Senior High School before taking THEN101.
2. Two required Jesuit Core Courses, namely THEN103 (Christian: Love, Family Life, and Society) and PHIN101 (Logical and Critical Thinking), as developed, comply with the criteria for the design of GE Elective Courses. As such, students may also opt to have any of these courses credited as a GE Elective. Consequently, the total credit units earned may be reduced by the same number of Jesuit Core units credited towards the required GE Electives.
3. The College SRA must be finished within the first two curriculum years.
4. Seniors' Retreat and Community Outreach Program are requirements for graduation.", '[GENERAL] CSEA Organizational Structure 1st sem SY 2025 2026

COLLEGE OF SCIENCE, ENGINEERING, AND ARCHITECTURE 

The College of Science, Engineering, and Architecture excels with board exam results 
surpassing national averages. It boasts PAASCU-accredited programs and well-equipped 
laboratories for hands-on learning. Students are engaged in community-based research and 
integrated Service Learning Program (SLP). They also benefit from strong industry and LGU 
partnerships, shaping a practical, industry-relevant education. 

HIGHLIGHTS 

●​ 2023 UNESCO World Engineering Day Hackathon Winner: Team SPONGE 
●​ The Golden Builders - Ranked First in the Skills Olympics 2023 Digital Road Design 
Competition. 
●​ The only university in Bicol using a BIM Laboratory / Smart Laboratory. 

COURSES 

●​ BS Architecture 
●​ BS Biology 
●​ BS Civil Engineering 
●​ BS Computer Engineering 
●​ BS Electronics Engineering 
●​ BS Environmental Management 
●​ BS Mathematics 
●​ Bachelor of Engineering Technology major in Computer Engineering Technology', '**BS ECE — 2nd year**

## Others:
1. Introduction to Catholic Faith: Non-credit, required for all non-Catholic and graduates of non-Catholic Senior High School before taking THEN101.
2. Two required Jesuit Core Courses, namely THEN103 (Christian: Love, Family Life, and Society) and PHIN101 (Logical and Critical Thinking), as developed, comply with the criteria for the design of GE Elective Courses. As such, students may also opt to have any of these courses credited as a GE Elective. Consequently, the total credit units earned may be reduced by the same number of Jesuit Core units credited towards the required GE Electives.
3. The College SRA must be finished within the first two curriculum years.
4. Seniors' Retreat and Community Outreach Program are requirements for graduation.", "**BS ECE — 1st year**
